case_title: NATIONAL CAB CO., INC. VS. CHARLIE FRANCIS MCCOY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DON HINOS--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
